title: Pan-Fried Vegetable Dumplings
description: A Chinese-inspired vegetarian dish featuring pan-fried dumplings filled with a rich mixture of vegetables.

ingredients.name: Dumpling wrappers
ingredients.notes: You can find these at most Asian grocery stores

instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine cabbage, carrots, green onions, and ginger.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce and 1 tablespoon of water.
3. Add the soy sauce mixture to the vegetable mixture and stir to combine.
4. Lay a dumpling wrapper on a flat surface and place 1 tablespoon of the vegetable mixture in the center of the wrapper.
5. Brush the edges of the wrapper with a small amount of water.
6. Fold the wrapper into a half-moon shape and press the edges together to seal the dumpling.
7. Repeat with the remaining wrappers and filling.
8. Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
9. When the oil is hot, add the dumplings and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until they are golden brown.
10. Serve the dumplings hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
